prose:
The frontier orbital calculation on benzene was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) level in PySCF. The calculation was conducted in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz`, and the DFT calculation was a single point on this geometry. The SCF converged in 8 cycles.

The HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.6310857 eV.
The HOMO energy is -7.0468329 eV.
The LUMO energy is -0.41574728 eV.

No warnings were reported by the calculation engine. The integrity of the result is trustworthy.

The output JSON file for this calculation is `benzene_dft_orbitals.json`.
